scene_summary: A dark observatory-like study with a large question ledger, star-dotted dome ceiling, brass-mounted text strip, porcelain vessel, engraved tablet, retro moon monitor, orbit model, hanging pennant, and open star chart all visibly available as interaction surfaces.

detected_objects.label: Gut-Check Star Ledger
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large upright black slate on the left with the title 'GUT-CHECK STAR LEDGER' and numbered question rows.

detected_objects.label: ASCII Comet Dome
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Curved overhead observatory dome filled with constellation labels, dotted star fields, and ASCII-like comet lettering.

detected_objects.label: Variable Type Constellation Strip
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Long narrow black strip across the middle reading 'When we are stardust we’ll still be looking up.'

detected_objects.label: Concealed-Egg Signal Vessel
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Open white porcelain egg-shaped vessel with blue star markings and coiled dark material inside.

detected_objects.label: Skill Navigation Tablet
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Central tilted dark tablet titled 'SKILL NAVIGATION TABLET' with listed entries such as CLARITY, COURAGE, DISCIPLINE, and KINDNESS.

detected_objects.label: Heisei Tape Moon Monitor
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Boxy CRT monitor showing a blue moon image with VHS-style overlay text including 'PLAY' and timestamp.

detected_objects.label: Omma Kinetic Orbit Model
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Right-side armillary orbit sculpture with translucent rings, spheres, and a labeled circular base.

detected_objects.label: Fifty-Watt Ephemera Pennant
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Hanging tan paper pennant on the right labeled 'FIFTY-WATT EPHEMERA' with a starburst illustration and small text.

detected_objects.label: Aura Restart Star Chart
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Open book or folded chart at the bottom foreground titled 'AURA RESTART STAR CHART' with circular star-map diagrams.

detected_objects.label: Gut-Check Star Ledger
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source artifact from the scene brief.
